creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ak
Date: Wed May  7 14:53:54 2014
New Revision: 353161
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353161
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353161/

Log:
  Remove entry for sysutils/condor, it is no longer requires registration/manual download
  
  PR:	ports/189085
  Submitted by:	Jason Bacon <jwbacon@tds.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/LEGAL

Modified: head/LEGAL
==============================================================================
--- head/LEGAL	Wed May  7 14:42:43 2014	(r353160)
+++ head/LEGAL	Wed May  7 14:53:54 2014	(r353161)
@@ -56,7 +56,6 @@ citrix_ica-*		net/citrix_ica		License pr
 cli_freebsd*		sysutils/arcconf	May not be redistributed in binary form
 clustalw-*		biology/clustalw	No commercial use
 coldwar_demo*		games/linux-coldwar-demo	Redistribution is limited, see license
-condor_src-*		sysutils/condor		Requires (free) registration
 contool-*		sysutils/contool	Do not incorporate the source code into a product which is subsequently sold
 cos-*			java/cos		Special conditions apply for commercial use
 cosmo/*			games/cosmo		Possible copyright infringement
